label.title: Versions Cleaner
label.description: Scan the JCR version storage tree to reduce history size and remove orphaned versions. The operation runs asynchronously in the background.
label.alreadyRunning: A clean operation is already in progress.
label.error: Failed to start the cleaner. Check server logs for details.
label.nbVersionsToKeepTooltip: Number of versions to keep per non-orphan history. Set to -1 to skip non-orphan histories entirely.
label.maxExecutionTimeTooltip: Maximum execution time in milliseconds. Set to 0 for unlimited. The process saves its position so it can resume where it stopped.
label.pauseDurationTooltip: Milliseconds to sleep between each version deletion. Set to 0 to disable.
label.subtreePathTooltip: Restrict the scan to a subtree of the version storage. Leave blank to process the full tree.

scheduler.title: Scheduled job
scheduler.restartHint: Schedule changes (enable/disable, cron) require a module restart to take effect.
scheduler.enabledTooltip: When enabled, the cleanup runs automatically according to the cron expression below.
scheduler.cronExpressionTooltip: Quartz cron expression defining when the scheduled cleanup runs. Example: "0 30 1 * * ?" runs every day at 01:30.
